🌙 Una Luna

🪸 Coral Reef Crisis

Case study: Great Barrier Reef, Australia. Marine heat stress can trigger coral bleaching, habitat degradation and food-web disruption.

Australiacoral bleachingreef food webs

🚰 Drought Stress Zone

Case study: Brazil. Amazon drought can shrink aquatic habitats, raise water temperatures and affect river food webs.

Brazildroughtaquatic stress

⛰️ Altitude Migration

Case study: Peru. Tropical montane species may shift upslope as temperatures change, affecting niches and biodiversity.

Peruupslope shiftgenetic reservoir
